vocab.meaning: phần thiết yếu, không thể tách rời
vocab.example: Carrying a heavy laptop and various chargers is part and parcel of my morning routine as a freelancer.

vocab.meaning: vào lúc tảng sáng, rất sớm
vocab.example: When I leave at the crack of dawn, my bag is stuffed with breakfast bars and a thermos to keep me going.

vocab.meaning: ăn mặc sang trọng, lộng lẫy
vocab.example: In the evening, especially when dressed to the nines, I only carry a tiny clutch that barely fits my phone.

vocab.meaning: kiểm soát, giữ cho cái gì đó không quá mức
vocab.example: I try to keep the contents of my bag in check during the evening to avoid looking overly encumbered.
I used to carry my whole world in my backpack, but I had a change of heart and now prefer a more minimalist approach after 6 PM.

vocab.meaning: ngày qua ngày (thường là việc lặp đi lặp lại)
vocab.example: Day in, day out, my morning bag is a practical survival kit, whereas my evening essentials are purely for leisure.

vocab.meaning: làm việc gì đó một cách nhanh nhất, bỏ qua các chi tiết (để tiết kiệm sức/thời gian)
vocab.example: I can't afford to cut corners with my morning prep, so I always double-check that every document is in my folder.

vocab.meaning: nỗ lực nhiều hơn sự mong đợi
vocab.example: I go the extra mile in the morning by carrying a backup power bank, just in case my phone dies during a busy day.

vocab.meaning: làm việc gì đó một cách nhanh chóng khi đang di chuyển
vocab.example: In the morning, I carry my tablet so I can respond to urgent emails on the fly during my commute.
The sleek, stylish wallet I carry at night is a far cry from the bulky organizer I use for work in the morning.
